heading: Examples
body:
The following examples demonstrate how to parse filenames into
computed fields:

- [Parse Single Field from Filename](adf-advanced-path-parse-single)

- [Parse Multiple Fields from Filename](adf-advanced-path-parse-multiple)

- [Use Regular Expression to Parse Fields from Filename](adf-advanced-path-parse-regex)

- [Identify Ranges of Queryable Data from Filename](adf-advanced-path-parse-range)

- [Identify Nested Fields from Filename](adf-advanced-parse-nested-fields)

- [Create Partitions from ObjectIds](adf-advanced-path-objectids)

- [Create Partitions from File Path](adf-advanced-path-create-partition)

- [Create Partitions from ISODate](adf-advanced-path-isodate)

- [Generate Dynamic Collection Names from File Path](adf-advanced-path-generate-collection)
